examples: Michigan dude is Napoleon and he's the very same person as New York dude.
Napoleon, who was always considered to be kind of a dwarf, a midget, really wasn't at all.
Brother New York and Brother Michigan are one person, both Napoleon, and he is divided into two.
As Napoleon said, if you say you're going to take Vienna, you take Vienna.
As Napoleon might say, you don't mess with winter in that part of the world.
